name: Fuji Frontier - Master 0 (base scanner layer)
description: Shared scanner-look layer applied beneath every film delta preset. Emulates Fuji Frontier 'Master 0' defaults so the Frontier signature is added once, not baked twice. Film presets stack their film-specific deltas on top of this base.

input_transform.comment: De-log / scan-normalization stage applied to the flat 16-bit input BEFORE any film look. BRIGHTNESS KNOBS: 'gamma' is the main exposure dial (>1 brighter midtones, <1 darker). 'delog_strength' blends in an S-curve to restore contrast, but it darkens everything below mid-grey, so lower it if images come out too dark. 'black_clip_pct' deepens blacks (lower = lifted/brighter shadows); 'white_clip_pct' brightens highlights (higher = more pixels pushed to white). auto_levels stretches the real black/white points back to full range, clipping a tiny percentile of outliers. neutralize aligns the per-channel medians toward a common grey to strip residual scan cast so every stock starts from a consistent neutral anchor; neutralize_strength is 0..1 (0 = off).

look_defaults.comment: Film characteristics applied to EVERY stock unless its preset overrides them. 'halation' adds the red/orange highlight bloom from film's anti-halation layer (intensity = strength, threshold = highlight luma cutoff, radius = resolution-independent bloom size, color = tint; tint is forced neutral for monochrome stocks). 'grain_extraction' lifts the scan's own high-frequency grain residual and re-applies it midtone-weighted (strength = amount, radius = high-pass size). Override either block under a preset's 'pipeline'.

base_look.comment: Moderate S-curve, mild shadow deepening, slight highlight compression, low-key cyan/green coolness, saturation a few points above neutral.
